highlights.text: I was looking for this price action action today, and I wrote in 4pm newsletter yesterday: “My general lean is we can run to 5896 flag resistance, perhaps dip again there to fill out the range again, then try a breakout to 5915+.” We ran to range resistance, sold this morning to 5840s, and then popped.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into yesterdays long setup which produces a 50 point rally (Hint: It was caused by my core setup, the Failed Breakdown).

post_title: *13 Days* Of Basing For SPX. Huge Move Ahead. Can Earnings Trigger It? Oct 31 Plan
